case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES LLC VS. MICHAEL PICOT et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: 1) REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT [CCP 585]; 2) COPIES IN LIEU OF ORIGINALS [EVIDENCE 1550]; 3 INTEREST FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES LLC
